hero.title: Custom Software that Accelerates Your Business
hero.subtitle: We develop custom software solutions that integrate seamlessly into your processes. From concept to deployment, each project is unique — built with technical expertise and attention to detail that your business deserves.

about.title: Technical Excellence and Commitment to Results
about.content: Lecabe specializes in transforming business challenges into high-impact technology solutions. With over 5 years of experience, we deliver projects that combine technical expertise with deep understanding of your processes. Every line of code is designed to generate real value and measurable results.

family.title: Direct Communication
family.description: Close and transparent relationship with direct access to the technical team

custom.title: 100% Customized
custom.description: Each project is unique, developed specifically for your needs

partnership.title: Continuous Partnership
partnership.description: We follow your project from start to finish, and beyond

items.quote: Lecabe understood exactly what we needed and delivered beyond expectations. The software transformed our internal processes.
items.author: Carlos Silva

items.quote: Professionalism and attention to detail. The Lecabe team is a true partner, always available to adjust and improve.
items.author: Ana Martins

items.quote: We reduced 40% of manual process time after implementation. Excellent cost-benefit and impeccable support.
items.author: Roberto Costa

items.question: How much does custom software development cost?
items.answer: The investment varies according to project complexity. We offer a free initial consultation to understand your needs and present a detailed quote, with no obligation.

items.question: How long does it take to develop a project?
items.answer: Simple projects can be delivered in 4-8 weeks. More complex projects follow our agile methodology with incremental deliveries, allowing you to see results from the first weeks.

items.question: Do you offer support after delivery?
items.answer: Yes! We offer maintenance and continuous support plans. Our team is available for adjustments, improvements, and problem resolution with guaranteed response time.

items.question: What technologies do you work with?
items.answer: We master the main technologies in the market: Vue.js, React, Node.js, Python, PHP, SQL and NoSQL databases, plus cloud (AWS, Azure). We choose the best stack for each project.

items.question: How does the development process work?
items.answer: We follow 5 stages: Discovery (understand your business), Requirements (document needs), Design (prototype solutions), Development (build with quality), and Deployment (deliver and support).

q1.question: How long does it take to develop software?
q1.answer: An MVP can be developed in 4-8 weeks. More complex projects range from 3-6 months depending on scope. We work with agile methodology, so you see results from the first weeks.

q2.question: Do you do both web and mobile?
q2.answer: Yes! We develop web applications (Vue.js, React), native mobile (iOS/Android) and hybrid (React Native). We can create multi-platform solutions or focus on a specific platform.

q3.question: How does the change process work during development?
q3.answer: We work with agile sprints, allowing continuous adjustments and improvements. Small changes are incorporated naturally. Significant scope changes are evaluated together.

q4.question: Does the source code stay with my company?
q4.answer: Yes, 100%! All developed code is your company's property. We deliver complete repository with documentation and maintenance instructions.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Idea into Reality?
cta.description: Let's talk about your project and find the best solution

q1.question: How much can I save by migrating to cloud?
q1.answer: Companies generally save 20-40% in infrastructure costs after optimized migration. Besides direct savings, there are gains in scalability, availability and team productivity.

q2.question: Does migration cause service interruption?
q2.answer: No! We plan migrations with zero downtime. We use strategies like blue-green deployment and gradual migration to ensure your services remain available.

q3.question: Which cloud provider do you recommend?
q3.answer: It depends on your needs. AWS is the most complete, Azure integrates well with Microsoft, Google Cloud is strong in data and ML. We evaluate your case to recommend the best option.

q4.question: Do you manage the cloud after migration?
q4.answer: Yes! We offer managed cloud service with monitoring, continuous optimization, security updates and support. You focus on business, we take care of infrastructure.

cta.title: Ready to Modernize Your Infrastructure?
cta.description: Get a free assessment of your current infrastructure

hero.subtitle: We create intuitive interfaces based on research and real data

testing.description: Validation with real users before development

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Validation with real users and iteration

techStack.title: Design Tools
techStack.description: We use the best tools for design and prototyping

q1.question: Why invest in UX/UI?
q1.answer: Good design increases conversions by 200% and reduces support costs by 50%. Satisfied users become brand promoters and return more often. It's investment, not cost.

q2.question: How long does a design project take?
q2.answer: A UX Audit takes 1-2 weeks. A complete redesign takes 4-8 weeks depending on complexity. We work with design sprints for incremental deliveries.

q3.question: Do you do tests with real users?
q3.answer: Yes! We include usability testing in all projects. We recruit participants from your target audience and conduct moderated sessions to validate design before development.

q4.question: What is a Design System and do I need one?
q4.answer: Design System is a library of reusable components that accelerates development and ensures consistency. We recommend it for medium/large products or with multiple platforms.

cta.title: Let's Improve Your Users' Experience?
cta.description: Request a free UX Audit of your product

q1.question: Does my company have enough data for AI?
q1.answer: It depends on the use case. Some models work with little data (few-shot learning), others need larger volumes. We do an initial assessment to determine feasibility.

q2.question: How much does it cost to implement an AI solution?
q2.answer: A PoC starts at accessible values for validation. Complete implementations vary according to complexity. ROI is generally achieved in 6-12 months with process automation.

q3.question: How to ensure the model remains accurate?
q3.answer: We implement continuous performance monitoring and periodic retraining. We automatically detect drift (degradation) and adjust the model as needed.

q4.question: Do you use ready-made or custom models?
q4.answer: It depends on the case. For chatbots we use LLMs like GPT-4 with fine-tuning. For specific cases, we train custom models. We always seek the best cost-benefit.

cta.title: Ready to Implement AI in Your Business?
cta.description: Let's identify high-impact use cases for your company

meta.title: About Us | Lecabe's History and Values
meta.description: Learn our story, our values and the principles that guide our work in delivering innovative technology solutions.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: Learn how Lecabe came to be and the values that guide us

story.title: How We Started
story.content:
Lecabe was born from the vision of creating a software company that truly understands its clients' needs. Founded in 2019, we started with a small team of passionate developers who believed technology should be accessible and truly useful.

Over the years, we have grown organically, always prioritizing quality over quantity. Each project taught us something new, each client helped us improve our process. Today, we are proud to say we maintain the same values we started with: technical excellence, transparency and genuine commitment to our clients' success.

Our goal has always been clear: to be more than just a software supplier. We want to be strategic partners, contributing real value and helping our clients achieve their goals. And that's exactly what we do, project after project.

excellence.title: Technical Excellence
excellence.description: We pursue mastery in every line of code, every design and every solution we deliver

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear and honest communication at every stage, without surprises or hidden information

partnership.title: True Partnership
partnership.description: Your success is our success. We work as an extension of your team

innovation.description: Always up to date with the latest technologies and best market practices

impact.title: Real Impact
impact.description: Solutions that generate measurable results and make a difference in your business

quality.title: Quality Without Negotiation
quality.description: We never compromise quality to meet unrealistic deadlines

understanding.title: 1. Deep Understanding
understanding.description: Before writing any code, we invest time in truly understanding your business, your users and your challenges. This is what allows us to deliver solutions that really solve.

collaboration.title: 2. Active Collaboration
collaboration.description: We work closely with your team, maintaining open and constant communication. You are not just a client, you are part of the process.

delivery.title: 3. Progressive Delivery
delivery.description: We work with agile methodology, delivering value from the first weeks. This allows you to see the project evolve and make adjustments along the way.

support.title: 4. Continuous Support
support.description: Our commitment doesn't end with delivery. We are here for updates, improvements and to help your software evolve with your business.

meta.title: Work Culture | Environment and Benefits at Lecabe
meta.description: Learn about Lecabe's culture, our work environment, our benefits and what it's like to be part of our team.

hero.title: Our Culture
hero.subtitle: An environment where people grow and thrive

intro.title: Work Environment
intro.content:
At Lecabe, we believe that talented people thrive in an environment of trust, autonomy and continuous learning. We cultivate a culture where everyone has a voice, where mistakes are learning opportunities and where technical excellence goes hand in hand with empathy and collaboration.

We are not a perfect company, but we constantly work to become a better place to work. We hear our team, we adjust processes and we always seek to balance productivity with quality of life.
